description: A designed quad-panel headline collage from DHS in red-white-and-blue patriotic styling, captioned in the tweet simply 'WINNING'. The graphic is arranged as a 2x2 grid, each quadrant carrying the masthead/logo of a major news outlet over a faint immigration-themed photo, with key phrases highlighted in yellow marker style. Top left: 'FOX NEWS' over a border-patrol vehicle photo, headline 'CBP releases March border crossing numbers, marking lowest to date ever recorded'. Top right: 'THE DAILY SIGNAL' over a border-wall photo, headline 'EXCLUSIVE: Number of Unaccompanied Alien Children Arriving at Border Hits Record Low Under Trump'. Bottom left: 'The New York Times' headline 'The Self-Deporters: Our immigration correspondent has found a surprising trend'. Bottom right: 'NEW YORK POST' headline 'Trump administration has arrested 113K migrants, deported over 100K since taking office'. A blue footer bar carries the circular DHS seal. The technique is a 'media validation' montage that aggregates favorable mainstream and conservative press headlines to project success of the administration's border-enforcement agenda; highlighting statistics in yellow draws attention to record-low crossings and high arrest/deportation totals. Target audience is the general public and supporters, signaling policy success.
notable_text: WINNING; CBP releases March border crossing numbers, marking lowest to date ever recorded; Number of Unaccompanied Alien Children Arriving at Border Hits Record Low Under Trump; The Self-Deporters; Trump administration has arrested 113K migrants, deported over 100K since taking office
